underlying_goal: User wanted to manage and enhance their Obsidian knowledge base, specifically creating/editing knowledge cards about developer tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Claudian, NanoClaw) and understanding exchange rate concepts
friction_detail: User rejected overly detailed content on Claude Code vs Cursor card (wanted only image summary), and Claude initially searched wrong topic (Claude Code instead of Claudian plugin)
brief_summary: User created multiple knowledge cards about developer tools and configured Claudian plugin settings; most tasks completed successfully after correcting two misunderstandings about scope and search target.
